actor_claims.quote_text: Mac-Gray should continue to seek a higher value for stockholders
Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona continued to conduct business and legal due diligence
CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement
CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement
Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona continued to conduct business and legal due diligence
Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona continued to conduct business and legal due diligence
Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona continued to conduct business and legal due diligence
representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch participated in a telephone conference call with Mr. MacDonald
representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter, were also present
Goodwin Procter delivered to Kirkland & Ellis LLP, outside legal counsel to CSC/Pamplona
Mr. MacDonald voiced his general support for continuing with the process
Mr. Rothenberg indicated he would like to discuss the possibility of an equity rollover with CSC/Pamplona
it was determined that Moab would not rollover any Moab shares in the transaction

bid_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer
On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share
Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share
CSC/Pamplona were willing to increase their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as a last and best offer
the all-cash per share purchase price of $21.25, we refer to as the CSC/Pamplona final proposal
Representatives from Goodwin Procter reviewed the terms of the CSC/Pamplona final proposal with the Special Committee, including the $21.25 per share cash consideration

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a $20.75 per share all-cash proposal and requested exclusive negotiations for two weeks.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share, reiterating that Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction and requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to engage in exclusive negotiations for two weeks

event_claims.description: Party A reiterated that its previous $18.00 to $19.00 per share all-cash indication was its best and final offer.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on September 18, 2013, Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a revised indication of interest valued at $21.50 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share

event_claims.description: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share nor did it specify any reasons in connection therewith

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized the Transaction Committee to inform CSC/Pamplona it would be prepared to move into exclusivity at $21.25 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: The Special Committee then authorized the Transaction Committee to inform CSC/Pamplona that the Special Committee would be prepared to move into exclusivity at a price of $21.25 per share

event_claims.description: The Transaction Committee proposed exclusive negotiations with CSC/Pamplona for two weeks if CSC/Pamplona increased its all-cash price to $21.25 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 21, 2013, the members of the Transaction Committee called the representative of CSC/Pamplona to propose that Mac-Gray was prepared to move forward with CSC/Pamplona on an exclusive basis for two weeks subject to CSC/Pamplona increasing their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona confirmed it was willing to increase its all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as a last and best offer if Mac-Gray agreed to two weeks of exclusivity.
event_claims.quote_text: Later that same day, the representative of CSC/Pamplona called the members of the Transaction Committee to confirm that CSC/Pamplona were willing to increase their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as a last and best offer, provided that Mac-Gray agree to a two week period of exclusive negotiations

event_claims.description: The parties negotiated terms of the exclusivity agreement, including an October 12, 2013 expiration date and no financing contingency.
event_claims.quote_text: Between September 21, 2013 and September 23, 2013, the parties negotiated the terms of the exclusivity agreement, including an expiration date of October 12, 2013

event_claims.description: Pamplona committed to fund 100% of the capital needed for closing.
event_claims.quote_text: Pamplona was committing to fund 100% of the capital needed for closing

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement through 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: After discussion, the Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013 on the terms included in the CSC/Pamplona final proposal

event_claims.description: CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 24, 2013, CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013

event_claims.description: It was determined that Moab would not roll over any Moab shares in the transaction.
event_claims.quote_text: As a result of such discussions, it was determined that Moab would not rollover any Moab shares in the transaction

event_claims.actor_label: Mr. MacDonald, his wife and one of his trusts
event_claims.description: Mr. MacDonald, his wife and one of his trusts entered into the MacDonald voting agreements on September 27, 2013, effective upon entry into the merger agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: the terms of the MacDonald voting agreements, which were entered into by Mr. MacDonald, his wife and one of his trusts on September 27, 2013, and which became effective upon entry into the merger agreement

event_claims.description: CSC and Pamplona were granted full access to the electronic data site and management access and conducted confirmatory due diligence on Mac-Gray.
event_claims.quote_text: Also during this time, CSC and Pamplona were granted full access to the electronic data site and access to certain members of management and conducted confirmatory business and legal due diligence on Mac-Gray

event_claims.description: Kirkland proposed a $15 million Mac-Gray termination fee in a revised draft merger agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on October 7, 2013, Kirkland delivered to Goodwin Procter a revised draft of the merger agreement which, among other things, proposed a $15 million Mac-Gray termination fee

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized an extension of exclusivity to October 15, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: After discussion, the Special Committee authorized the Transaction Committee to negotiate the open issues within certain parameters and in connection therewith to extend exclusivity to October 15, 2013

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona requested an extension of exclusivity until the end of October 15, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: CSC/Pamplona had requested an extension of exclusivity until the end of the day on October 15, 2013
